---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What is frustrating about the current behavior?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about? Why do you prefer your proposal?

## Use case

Who benefits from this feature and how? A concrete scenario helps.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar implementations elsewhere, etc.
